summary: Drill-down navigation testing for Admin Operational Dashboards completed. All 10 test cases passed (100%). All metric cards navigate to correct filtered pages with proper URL params. Filter indicators display correctly with Clear Filters functionality working on both Orders and Dispatch pages.
passed_tests: TEST 1: 'Pending Dispatch' metric card navigates to /dispatch?status=PENDING
TEST 2: 'Partially Dispatched' metric card navigates to /dispatch?status=PARTIAL
TEST 3: 'Completed Today' metric card navigates to /orders?status=COMPLETED
TEST 4: 'Urgent Pending' metric card navigates to /orders?priority=URGENT
TEST 5: 'Awaiting Receipt' metric card navigates to /orders?status=FULLY_DISPATCHED
TEST 6: Department row in Overview tab navigates to /dispatch?department={id}
TEST 7: 'Patient Metrics' card switches to Patients tab
TEST 8: Clear Filters button on Orders page removes URL params and reloads data
TEST 9: Clear Filters button on Dispatch page removes URL params and reloads data
TEST 10: Department row in Departments tab navigates to /dispatch?department={id}

features_verified.click_to_view_details_text: Present on all 6 metric cards with ChevronRight arrow icon

filter_indicators.Orders page: Shows filter indicator bar with Status/Priority/Dept labels
filter_indicators.Dispatch page: Shows filter indicator bar with Pending Dispatch/Partially Dispatched/Dept labels

clear_filters.Orders page: Clear button removes URL params, header indicator removed, reloads all data
clear_filters.Dispatch page: Clear button removes URL params, header indicator removed, reloads all data

department_navigation.Overview tab: 5 department rows visible, click navigates to /dispatch?department={id}
department_navigation.Departments tab: 14 departments listed with 'Click to view dispatch queue →' text, click navigates to /dispatch?department={id}

features_verified.patient_metrics_navigation: Clicking Patient Metrics card switches to Patients tab in same dashboard

seed_data_creation: Used existing simulation data from previous iteration
context_for_next_testing_agent: Drill-down navigation fully functional. All metric cards are clickable with 'Click to view details →' text. Orders and Dispatch pages support URL query params for filtering (status, priority, department). Filter indicators appear in header with Clear button. Department rows in both Overview and Departments tabs navigate to filtered dispatch queue. Patient Metrics card switches to Patients tab within same dashboard.
